share.share_text:
Well thank-ya Newcastle for turning it on for The Dustys! 
Thankyou to @theoak.tigheshill for being the most gracious hosts, we luv your fine establishment!
Special thanks to Dave Favours & the Roadside Ashes for sharing the stage with us.
Last but not least, a big thank-you to everyone who came along, we made lotsa new friends, so we look forward to being back in Newie again real soon.
Luv,
The Dustys
